plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AppéFit to scan ingredients with your camera.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow AppéFit to choose ingredient photos from your library.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow AppéFit to use your microphone for ingredient dictation.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow AppéFit to recognize dictated ingredients.

infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow AppéFit to recognize dictated ingredients.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow AppéFit to use your microphone for ingredient dictation.
